mapper.select: SELECT bi.*, b.company_name AS companyName FROM bizinfo bi JOIN business b ON bi.business_id = b.business_id WHERE bi.business_id = #{id}

SELECT r.review_id, r.content, r.image1, r.image2, r.image3, r.status, r.created_at, o.order_no AS orderNo, req.title AS requestTitle, oi.created_at AS startDate, req.requested_due_date AS endDate FROM review r JOIN order_items oi ON r.order_item_id = oi.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN bids b ON o.bid_id = b.bid_id JOIN request req ON b.request_id = req.request_id WHERE r.business_id = #{id} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT c.career_id AS careerId, c.bizinfo_id AS bizinfoId, c.work_description AS workDescription FROM career c JOIN bizinfo b ON c.bizinfo_id = b.bizinfo_id WHERE b.business_id = #{id} ORDER BY c.career_id ASC
